  "society_power": 8.5,
  "state_power": 9.5,
  "society_change": 0.8,
  "state_change": -1.0,

  "reasoning": "The Civil Rights Movement and Voting Rights Act significantly strengthened civil society, while state power slightly declined due to increased social resistance and internal conflicts."
